title: Armadillos Drop Scute
description: Makes Armadillos drop Armadillo Scute upon death.
body:
**What this mod does**
Makes Armadillos drop 1 Armadillo Scute upon death.

This change makes armadillos' loot system comparable to sheep. Killing a sheep grants 1 wool, but shearing it is more profitable.
You may also like:
- [Turtles Drop Scute](https://modrinth.com/mod/turtles-drop-scute)

**What this mod does not do**
Does not remove the brush's ability to harvest Armadillo Scute.

This mod uses API features to ensure that its loot modifications are compatible with those of other mods, which is why it is not a datapack.
